changes.value:
src/search/mod.rs:27-195

Coverage: 14.9% (15/101 lines)

Uncovered lines: 27-56, 61-134, 141-195

```rust
pub fn get_search_client(&mut self) -> &BraveSearchClient
fn load_config_with_callback<T, F>(...) -> T
pub fn load_content_fetch_config() -> ContentFetchConfig
fn load_scoring_config() -> ScoringConfig
fn parse_size_string(size_str: &str) -> Result<usize, ...>
```

Major untested functions:
1. get_search_client() — lazy init of BraveSearchClient
2. load_content_fetch_config() — all config key extraction branches (lines 47-137)
3. load_scoring_config() — scoring config extraction (lines 141-181)
4. parse_size_string() — parse "2MB", "512KB", "1GB", plain number (lines 184-195)

parse_size_string is pure and easily testable. Config loading depends on swissarmyhammer_config but can test the callback pattern.
Add tests for WebSearcher config loading and parse_size_string
